tasks.completion_summary: Removed dead code: unused hasE and hasX variables containing always-false clause in set flag detection
Investigated and confirmed not a bug -- cd with relative paths behaves identically to bash. User error (typed cd work/beagle-term instead of cd beagle-term).
Implemented pipeline negation (! pipeline) -- parser consumes Bang token and sets Negated=true on Pipeline node, emitter appends exit code negation suffix
Implemented set -u / set -o nounset emitting Set-StrictMode -Version Latest; refactored short-flag path to use List<string> for proper multi-flag combinations

Added try/catch error handling for ConvertFrom-Json (jq, exit code 5), ConvertFrom-SimpleYaml (yq, exit code 1), and ConvertFrom-Csv (xan, exit code 1); migrated all Write-Error calls in these functions to Write-BashError

Migrated 16 utility functions to Write-BashError: replaced Write-Error in expr/env/sleep/time/which/alias/date, replaced throw in printf, added try/catch for pwd Resolve-Path, hostname DNS, and date string parsing

Hardened 14 text stream processors: replaced ReadAllBytes boilerplate with Read-BashFileBytes/Read-BashFileLines in 13 functions, replaced Write-Error with Write-BashError, replaced throw with Write-BashError+return in grep and rg, fixed Read-BashFileBytes helper to use Write-BashError

Hardened 14 text transform/output functions: replaced ReadAllBytes boilerplate with Read-BashFileLines/Read-BashFileBytes in 10 functions, replaced WriteAllText with Write-BashFileText in sed/tee/split, replaced Write-Error with Write-BashError in 5 functions, replaced throw with Write-BashError+return in sed (9 sites) and awk (1 site)

Hardened 15 filesystem commands: replaced Write-Error with Write-BashError across ls/find/stat/cp/mv/rm/mkdir/rmdir/touch/ln/du/tree/file/gzip/tar; migrated Get-Item to Get-BashItem in 10 functions; added -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue to 5 Get-ChildItem calls; added Read-BashFileRaw/Write-BashFileRaw helpers and migrated gzip/tar binary I/O; also fixed Get-BashItem and Write-BashFileText helpers to use Write-BashError
Added 13 integration tests for error scenarios: 5 file-not-found exit code tests, 3 usage error exit code tests, 4 control flow propagation tests, 1 stderr format verification test

Created docs/specs/error-handling.md documenting bash error handling simulation: command error behavior, global error infrastructure, file I/O helpers, intentional divergences from bash, and migration status table for all 70+ Invoke-Bash* functions
Grid mode in Invoke-BashLs now emits LsEntry objects instead of TextOutput; merged identical grid/one-per-line branches; removed dead $gridMode variable; updated test assertions

Added [OutputType] declarations and param() blocks to all 71 Invoke-Bash* functions in PsBash.psm1; 20 typed output functions use specific PSTypeNames, 51 use PsBash.TextOutput; verified $args still works without CmdletBinding

Added optional -Command parameter to New-BashObject and Emit-BashLine for source command metadata; wired through Invoke-BashEcho and Invoke-BashPrintf; skipped Invoke-BashRedirect (writes to files, not pipeline)

Fixed remaining PipedAliasDash completion test to accept PsBash bash-style flag completions (parameterValue/pipelineSort) alongside native PS parameterName completions; 4 of 5 tests were already fixed in prior commit
Added 71 Invoke-Bash* entries to BeagleTerm OutputTypeRegistry with correct PsBash type mappings (20 typed, 51 TextOutput); added 37 test cases

Replaced native tar.exe delegation with System.Formats.Tar implementation; supports -c/-x/-t/-f/-z/-v/-C/--exclude flags; auto-detects .tar.gz/.tgz extensions for gzip decompression; proper resource disposal with try/finally blocks

Added long-form flag handling to Invoke-BashGrep (--fixed-strings, --with-filename, --no-filename, --word-regexp, --only-matching, --max-count NUM/--max-count=NUM); fixed pipeline mode -H/-n combination bug; fixed tautological condition in single-line pipeline branch; updated BashFlagSpecs with 7 new flags
